name: Desview TP150 Portable Teleprompter for Tablets and Smartphones
description: Film scripted presentations with a camcorder, DSLR, or web camera with a single device using the TP150 Portable Teleprompter from Desview.

features.Key Features :: 70/30 Beamsplitter Glass | Fits Devices 7.9 to 15" | Film with Webcam, DSLR, or Camcorder | 3.1 to 4.9" Camera Height Adjustment | Tripod-Mountable Platform | Lens Hood with Drawstring | Prompting App, Remote Control
features.What's in The Box :: Desview TP150 Portable Teleprompter for Tablets and Smartphones | Drawstring Lens Hood | Beamsplitter Frame | Base | Height-Adjustable Mount | L-Shaped Thumbscrew | Remote Control | Dust Cloth | Hard Carrying Case
